headline: Teamsters terminate agreement, strike at Smurfit Westrock site set for closure
summary: The company says the union terminated the two parties’ labor agreement at the Wakefield, Massachusetts, corrugated converting plant. Approximately 90 employees will be affected when the facility closes this spring.
